requirement_topic.en: Motor nameplate, energy label, and duty/rating marking requirements (Saudi Arabia)
requirement_topic.zh: 电动机铭牌、能效标签及工作制/额定值标注要求（沙特阿拉伯）
requirement_topic.zht: 電動機銘牌、能效標籤及工作制/額定值標注要求（沙特阿拉伯）

summary.en: Saudi Arabia's technical regulations, administered by SASO, require that electric motors sold in the Kingdom carry a nameplate with mandatory marking information consistent with IEC 60034-1 (rated voltage, frequency, rated output power, efficiency class, duty cycle, insulation class, protection degree (IP code), and cos phi). Where an energy efficiency label is required under the SASO/SEEC energy labelling programme, the motor must display the prescribed SEEC energy efficiency label showing the IE efficiency class. Arabic-language labelling requirements may apply to product documentation and packaging under SASO general requirements for consumer and industrial goods. Exporters should verify current SASO labelling requirements at saso.gov.sa, including whether an energy label is mandatory for the motor power range being exported.
summary.zh: 沙特阿拉伯 SASO 技术法规要求在沙特王国销售的电动机须附有符合 IEC 60034-1 要求的铭牌，标注强制性信息，包括额定电压、频率、额定输出功率、能效等级、工作制、绝缘等级、防护等级（IP 代码）及功率因数（cos phi）。如 SASO/SEEC 能效标签项目要求贴附能效标签，则电动机须展示规定的 SEEC 能效标签，注明 IE 能效等级。SASO 对消费品和工业品的通用要求中可能包含对产品文件和包装的阿拉伯语标注要求。出口商应在 saso.gov.sa 核验现行 SASO 标注要求，包括所出口功率段的电动机是否须强制贴附能效标签。
summary.zht: 沙特阿拉伯 SASO 技術法規要求在沙特王國銷售的電動機須附有符合 IEC 60034-1 要求的銘牌，標注強制性信息，包括額定電壓、頻率、額定輸出功率、能效等級、工作制、絕緣等級、防護等級（IP 代碼）及功率因數（cos phi）。如 SASO/SEEC 能效標籤項目要求貼附能效標籤，則電動機須展示規定的 SEEC 能效標籤，注明 IE 能效等級。SASO 對消費品和工業品的通用要求中可能包含對產品文件和包裝的阿拉伯語標注要求。出口商應在 saso.gov.sa 核驗現行 SASO 標注要求，包括所出口功率段的電動機是否須強制貼附能效標籤。

standards_or_laws: SASO Technical Regulation for Electric Motors — marking and labelling requirements (verify current version at saso.gov.sa)
SEEC energy labelling programme for motors (verify at seec.gov.sa)
IEC 60034-1 (nameplate data requirements — rated voltage, output, efficiency class, duty, IP, insulation)

summary.en: Chinese motors manufactured to GB 755-2019 and GB 18613-2020 are required to carry a nameplate with rated data consistent with IEC 60034-1 / GB 755 requirements, including rated voltage, frequency, power, current, speed, efficiency, insulation class, IP protection degree, and duty type (S1–S10). The efficiency class (Grade 1/2/3 per GB 18613-2020, corresponding to IE5/IE4/IE3) must be marked. China's energy efficiency label (节能标识) is administered by MIIT/SAMR for products meeting the voluntary Grade 2 (IE4) or Grade 1 (IE5) level, but this label is not the same as the Saudi SEEC energy label and does not serve as an equivalent. Chinese nameplates are typically in Chinese (and sometimes English) — Arabic language marking is not standard practice.
summary.zh: 按 GB 755-2019 和 GB 18613-2020 生产的中国电动机须附有与 IEC 60034-1 / GB 755 要求一致的铭牌，标注额定电压、频率、功率、电流、转速、效率、绝缘等级、IP 防护等级及工作制（S1–S10）。须标注能效等级（按 GB 18613-2020 分为 1/2/3 级，分别对应 IE5/IE4/IE3）。中国能效标识（节能标识）由工业和信息化部/国家市场监督管理总局管理，适用于达到自愿性 2 级（IE4）或 1 级（IE5）水平的产品，但该标识与沙特 SEEC 能效标签不同，不构成等效。中国铭牌通常使用中文（有时含英文），阿拉伯语标注不是标准做法。
summary.zht: 按 GB 755-2019 和 GB 18613-2020 生產的中國電動機須附有與 IEC 60034-1 / GB 755 要求一致的銘牌，標注額定電壓、頻率、功率、電流、轉速、效率、絕緣等級、IP 防護等級及工作制（S1–S10）。須標注能效等級（按 GB 18613-2020 分為 1/2/3 級，分別對應 IE5/IE4/IE3）。中國能效標識（節能標識）由工業和信息化部/國家市場監督管理總局管理，適用於達到自願性 2 級（IE4）或 1 級（IE5）水準的產品，但該標識與沙特 SEEC 能效標籤不同，不構成等效。中國銘牌通常使用中文（有時含英文），阿拉伯語標注不是標準做法。

standards_or_laws: GB 755-2019 (旋转电机 定额和性能 — nameplate data requirements)
GB 18613-2020 (efficiency class marking on nameplate — Grade 1/2/3 = IE5/IE4/IE3)
China energy efficiency label (节能标识) — MIIT/SAMR (voluntary; not equivalent to Saudi SEEC label)

gap.en: Key labelling gaps for Chinese motors targeting Saudi Arabia: (1) IE class marking — Chinese motors must display the IE efficiency class (e.g., IE3) in IEC 60034-30-1 notation on the nameplate, not just the GB Grade number. Many Chinese nameplates show only GB Grade (3/2/1); the IE notation (IE3/IE4/IE5) must be clearly shown for Saudi compliance and SABER documentation. (2) SEEC energy label — if the Saudi SEEC energy labelling programme requires a label for the motor's power range, the SEEC-format label must be affixed; the Chinese national energy efficiency label is not a substitute. (3) Arabic language — SASO general requirements may require that product documentation, packaging, and user instructions include Arabic. Chinese-only or English-only documentation may not satisfy Saudi import requirements. (4) Voltage/frequency marking — motors must show the Saudi grid voltage (typically 380/220 V, 60 Hz) or confirm rated values applicable to the Saudi electrical network.
gap.zh: 中国电动机进入沙特阿拉伯市场的主要标注差距：(1) IE 等级标注——中国电动机铭牌须按 IEC 60034-30-1 标注 IE 能效等级（如 IE3），而非仅标注 GB 等级数字（3/2/1）；沙特合规和 SABER 文件要求明确标注 IE 等级（IE3/IE4/IE5）；(2) SEEC 能效标签——如沙特 SEEC 能效标签项目要求对该功率段电动机贴附标签，则须贴附 SEEC 格式的标签；中国国家能效标识不能替代；(3) 阿拉伯语——SASO 通用要求可能规定产品文件、包装和用户说明书须包含阿拉伯语；仅提供中文或英文文件可能无法满足沙特进口要求；(4) 电压/频率标注——铭牌须标注沙特电网电压（通常为 380/220 V，60 Hz），或确认额定值适用于沙特电气网络。
gap.zht: 中國電動機進入沙特阿拉伯市場的主要標注差距：(1) IE 等級標注——中國電動機銘牌須按 IEC 60034-30-1 標注 IE 能效等級（如 IE3），而非僅標注 GB 等級數字（3/2/1）；沙特合規和 SABER 文件要求明確標注 IE 等級（IE3/IE4/IE5）；(2) SEEC 能效標籤——如沙特 SEEC 能效標籤項目要求對該功率段電動機貼附標籤，則須貼附 SEEC 格式的標籤；中國國家能效標識不能替代；(3) 阿拉伯語——SASO 通用要求可能規定產品文件、包裝和用戶說明書須包含阿拉伯語；僅提供中文或英文文件可能無法滿足沙特進口要求；(4) 電壓/頻率標注——銘牌須標注沙特電網電壓（通常為 380/220 V，60 Hz），或確認額定值適用於沙特電氣網路。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SASO technical regulation and SEEC energy labelling requirements apply; Arabic language documentation requirements under SASO general import rules — mandatory-vs-voluntary scope for energy label requires verification at seec.gov.sa
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for nameplate data per GB 755-2019 and GB 18613-2020; Chinese energy efficiency label (节能标识) is voluntary for Grade 2/1 products

compliance_verdict.en: Chinese motors must have their nameplates updated to display the IE efficiency class (IE3/IE4/IE5) in IEC notation alongside the GB Grade — relying on GB Grade numbers alone is insufficient for Saudi SABER documentation and market compliance. If the SEEC energy labelling programme applies to the motor's power range, the SEEC-format energy label must be affixed; the Chinese national label does not substitute. Product documentation and packaging should include Arabic-language text to satisfy SASO import requirements. Exporters must also confirm that the motor's rated voltage and frequency match the Saudi grid (typically 380/220 V, 60 Hz).
compliance_verdict.zh: 中国电动机铭牌须更新，在 GB 等级基础上同时按 IEC 标注 IE 能效等级（IE3/IE4/IE5）——仅标注 GB 等级数字不足以满足 SABER 文件和市场合规要求。如 SEEC 能效标签项目适用于该电动机的功率段，须贴附 SEEC 格式的能效标签；中国国家标签不能替代。产品文件和包装应包含阿拉伯语内容，以满足 SASO 进口要求。出口商还须确认电动机额定电压和频率与沙特电网（通常为 380/220 V，60 Hz）匹配。
compliance_verdict.zht: 中國電動機銘牌須更新，在 GB 等級基礎上同時按 IEC 標注 IE 能效等級（IE3/IE4/IE5）——僅標注 GB 等級數字不足以滿足 SABER 文件和市場合規要求。如 SEEC 能效標籤項目適用於該電動機的功率段，須貼附 SEEC 格式的能效標籤；中國國家標籤不能替代。產品文件和包裝應包含阿拉伯語內容，以滿足 SASO 進口要求。出口商還須確認電動機額定電壓和頻率與沙特電網（通常為 380/220 V，60 Hz）匹配。

source.publisher: SASO — Saudi Standards, Metrology and Quality Organization (labelling and marking)
